steps.sql:
SELECT *
      FROM tab1 t1 LEFT JOIN tab2 t2 ON t1.t1_id = t2.t2_id_t1
      WHERE t2.t2_id IN
           (SELECT t2_id FROM tab2, tab3 ON t2_id = t3_id_t2
             WHERE t3_id IN (1,2));

SELECT *
      FROM tab1 t1 LEFT JOIN tab2 t2
      WHERE t2.t2_id IN
           (SELECT t2_id FROM tab2, tab3 ON t2_id = t3_id_t2
             WHERE t3_id IN (1,2));
